ddls:
CREATE TABLE "graphs" (
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* File name associated with the graph data */,
  "c_level" INTEGER /* Connectivity level of the graph */,
  "m_level" INTEGER /* M-connectivity level of the graph */,
  "vertices" INTEGER /* Number of vertices in the graph */,
  "connected_edges" INTEGER /* Number of connected edges in the graph */,
  "wedge_count" INTEGER /* Number of wedges in the graph */,
  "claw_count" INTEGER /* Number of claws in the graph */,
  "max_degree" INTEGER /* Maximum degree of any vertex in the graph */,
  "graph_type" TEXT /* Type of graph (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the graph */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph file */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the graph data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the graph file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the graph file (e.g., CSV, GEXF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_files_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, engineer) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the graph */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the graph was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_metrics_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graph visualization */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph that was visualized */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., 2D, 3D, network diagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_visualizations_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission the user has for the graph */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the prediction is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* The prediction made on the graph's behavior */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "date_made" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the report is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the annotation is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph that was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., addition, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_updates_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graph_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "graph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graph the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graph_tags_graph_id FOREIGN KEY ("graph_id") REFERENCES graphs ("graph_id")
)
